title: [Nyessem, Ring Loop]
description: The path divides, with a perpendicular cobbled section diverting off to a broad emerald-studded tunnel.  From out of the tunnel, the faint sound of flowing water resonates and the pungent floral aroma of greenery wafts on the air.  At the tunnel's mouth, a prominent metal plaque is embedded in the stone.  Across, a long stone sculpture of twin Nyessemian trees dominates the area opposite.  Between the sculpture's trees, a polished stone table is laden with food and drink options.
